payload.description:
Fix the Scorecards dashboard score-version detail tabs so Procedures and Evaluations show the records associated with the selected score version using first-class keyed access, not scans or slow client-side filtering.

Definition of Done:
- Procedures tab shows procedures associated with the selected score version.
- Evaluations tab shows evaluations associated with the selected score version.
- Data access uses the intended indexed association/query path.
- Regression coverage proves the score-version scoping behavior.
payload.title: Score version activity tabs use direct associations
